displayTitle: The Ewok Who Was Afraid: An Ewok Adventure
synopsis: Willy asks his big brother, Weechee, if he can be his partner in the raft race along the underground rapids. But the caves are dark and scary - and Willy is afraid. How Willy turns his fear into courage when it really counts is told in this exciting Ewok adventure!
title: The Ewok Who Was Afraid: An Ewok Adventure
